system.description: The corrupted character may have been hairy, but the patches of fur he’s been growing are nothing like what he had before. The fur can come in any variety of patterns or colors, but some will be more obvious than others. The fur covers most or all of the corrupted character’s body. The character’s Thermal Threshold is lowered by -5°F as long as it isn’t 0. If he has the scales mutation, that mutation is replaced by this one.
